narrative:
Lake Twp East (precinct in Wood County) has 1,182 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.9%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.8 percentage points.
